_ai_hint: ABAP boilerplate triggered only inside group_sap_runtime_windows. Triggers are short lowercase mnemonics. Values use \n for line breaks (hotstring.ahk resolves via utils.paste which handles multiline).

items.value:
SELECT *
  FROM 
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_)
  WHERE  = @lv_.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  
ENDIF.

SELECT SINGLE *
  FROM 
  INTO @DATA(ls_)
  WHERE  = @lv_.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  
ENDIF.

LOOP AT lt_ INTO DATA(ls_).
  
ENDLOOP.

LOOP AT lt_ INTO DATA(ls_) WHERE  = .
  
ENDLOOP.

TRY.
  
CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_).
  MESSAGE lx_->get_text() TYPE 'E'.
ENDTRY.

DATA: lv_ TYPE ,
      ls_ TYPE ,
      lt_ TYPE TABLE OF .

CLASS  DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: .
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS  IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD .
    
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_
  EXPORTING
    textid = cx_=>.

READ TABLE lt_ INTO DATA(ls_) WITH KEY  = .
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  
ENDIF.
MODIFY lt_ FROM ls_ TRANSPORTING  WHERE  = .
